# Tayyub Yaqoob

> UK-based data scientist and AI engineer. Senior Digital Analyst at 8 Million Stories, Stirling. Architects proprietary AI-analytics systems used by 50+ client teams. Published author at Cointelegraph (30+) and AlphaWire (5+). Quoted as expert source by CCN. Invited chapter reviewer for IGI Global.

## Key pages
- [Home](/): Positioning, client exposure, quantified-impact metrics, eight surfaces of work.
- [Systems](/systems): Eight proprietary analytics systems — forecasting, sentiment, anomaly detection, AI-mentions, deck generation, organic-insight automation.
- [Products](/products): Independent product work, including LedgerTouch (in development).
- [Writing](/publications): 35+ technical articles across Cointelegraph and AlphaWire; CCN expert quotes — verifiable on each outlet's profile.
- [Research](/research): External recognition (Cointelegraph + CCN), IGI Global completed-chapter-reviews record.
- [Words](/testimonials): Verbatim client quotes — BBC, General Mills (Blue Buffalo), Diligent Pharma, MRI Management.
- [About](/about): Bio, credentials grid (12 AI/ML certifications), operating principles.
- [Press kit](/press): Bios in three lengths (copy-paste ready), fact sheet, pull-quote paragraphs, expert topics, asset downloads, direct press contact.
- [Receipts](/receipts): Structured evidence backup — role, systems, products, writing, press, peer review, client impact, credentials.
- [Code](/open-source): Public engineering profile — github.com/tayyub-ai.
- [Contact](/contact): Media enquiries, podcasts, panels, commissioned writing, consulting.

- 8 proprietary analytics systems in production; 50+ client teams on the platform on a weekly cadence

## Current focus
AI agents and machine learning in production, AI-search disruption to organic visibility, consent-mode transparency, measurement-platform accountability. Building LedgerTouch — an independent analytics platform — outside agency work.
